raw.message:
🎁 Experience the thrill of Deal or No Deal – exclusive to tombola! Ready to take on the challenge?
Win up to £1,000 for FREE! 💸
SMS opt in required. 18+ gambleaware.org. T&Cs Apply

hook.summary: Branded 'Deal or No Deal' box opening with a 'Play for Free' callout.
hook.visual_action: A hand selects two numbered boxes which reveal monetary values.
hook.text_overlay: DEAL OR NO DEAL PLAY FOR FREE
hook.voiceover_transcript: Deal or No Deal at Tombola. Play for free.

scene_flow: Branded intro with 'Deal or No Deal' logo and Tombola branding.
Simulated gameplay showing a hand picking two boxes.
Reveal of prize amounts and a 'WINNER' celebration with confetti.
End card with 'Download to play' and app store icons.
audience_proxy: Adults 18+ who enjoy casual gambling and popular TV game show formats.
